nasb.text: I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will make myself like the Most High.’

esv.text: I will ascend above the heights of the clouds; I will make myself like the Most High.’

cnv.text: 我要升到雲的高處， 我要使自己像那至高者一般。’

ccb.text: 我要升到云天之上， 使自己与至高者一样。’

csbs.text: 我要升到云端之上， 我要使自己与至高者相比。’
